summary: Action Items and Activity Feed features VERIFIED. All APIs and UI components working correctly: (1) GET /api/activity/{user_id} returns contact_events with proper messages, icons, entity_ids; (2) GET /api/tasks/{user_id}?completed=false returns pending tasks sorted by due_date; (3) PUT /api/tasks/{user_id}/{task_id} marks tasks as done; (4) Home page shows Action Items section with pending tasks, overdue indicators, mark-as-done buttons; (5) Activity items are tappable and navigate to contact detail page.

activity_feed_api.details: GET /api/activity/{user_id}?limit=10 returns contact_events (digital_card_shared, review_request_sent, showcase_shared, etc.) with proper messages and icons

activity_items_have_entity_ids.details: Activity items have entity_id field for navigation to contact detail page

activity_icon_colors.details: Different event types have appropriate icon colors: digital_card=gold, review_request=yellow, showcase=green, sms=blue, email=purple

pending_tasks_api.details: GET /api/tasks/{user_id}?completed=false returns uncompleted tasks sorted by due_date ascending

task_completion_api.details: PUT /api/tasks/{user_id}/{task_id} with {completed: true} marks task as done and removes from pending list

action_items_section_ui.details: Home page shows Action Items section with pending tasks, View All link, and each task has type-specific icons

overdue_indicator.details: Overdue tasks show 'Overdue' label in red text

mark_as_done_button.details: Green checkmark button on right side of each task successfully marks task as complete and removes from list

activity_items_tappable.details: Activity items have chevron arrow and clicking navigates to /contact/{entity_id} page

activity_timestamps.details: Activity items show relative timestamps (Just now, 2m ago, 24m ago, etc.)

view_all_links.details: View All links visible for both Action Items (navigates to /tasks) and Recent Activity (navigates to /admin/activity-feed)

verified_features: GET /api/activity/{user_id} queries contact_events collection as PRIMARY source
Activity feed displays: digital_card_shared, review_request_sent, showcase_shared, sms_sent, email_sent, call_placed, note_updated, link_page_shared, contact_added, task_created, campaign_enrollment
Icon/color mapping: card=gold, star=yellow, storefront=green, chatbubble=blue, mail=purple, call=lightblue, checkmark=orange
Action Items section shows first 5 pending tasks sorted by due_date (most urgent first)
Overdue tasks display 'Overdue' label in red
Mark-as-done checkmark button removes task from list
Activity items are tappable TouchableOpacity with chevron-forward arrow
30-second auto-refresh for activity feed and tasks
critical_code_review_comments: Backend activity feed (server.py line 318-474): Correctly queries contact_events as PRIMARY source with proper icon/color/message mapping
Frontend Action Items (home.tsx line 575-628): Properly displays pending tasks with overdue indicators and mark-as-done buttons
Task completion (home.tsx line 411-417): completeTask() calls PUT API and removes task from local state
Activity navigation (home.tsx line 654-661): TouchableOpacity with onPress navigates to /contact/{entity_id}
getTaskIcon helper (home.tsx line 419-428): Maps task types to appropriate icons (mail, chatbubble, call, arrow-redo, calendar, gift, rocket, checkmark-circle)
seed_data_creation: Created test task 'TEST_Action_Item_Follow_Up_Call' to verify mark-as-done functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Action Items and Activity Feed features are fully working. Activity feed pulls from contact_events collection with proper icon/color mapping. Action Items shows pending tasks with overdue indicators and mark-as-done buttons. Activity items are tappable and navigate to contact detail page. Note: TEST_CAMP_TASK entries are from previous test runs and show as overdue.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - not testing actual SMS sending
